sections.paragraph:
(with Kametz impure for עַדִּיץ) adj. and subst. pr. terrifying, causing fear; hence-

(1) very powerful, used of God, Jerem. 20:11 of powerful nations, Isa 25:3.

(2) in a bad sense, violent, fierce, Psa 37:35 Isa 13:11 25:3 Job 15:20 27:13 . Eze 28:7, עָרִיצֵי גֹויִם “violent nations;” 30:11 31:12 32:12 .
